title: Room bulletin board (v1)
description: A single room's bulletin board persisted as data/boards/<room-id>.json. Holds the notes players have pinned to that room via the NOTE POST command. The loader tolerates unknown properties (AGENTS.md §11) and derives each note's room from its own room_id field, so the file name is only a convenience.

notes.description: The notes pinned to this room's board, ordered oldest first.

id.description: Unique, stable note id (a UUID for notes created in-game).

author.description: Username of the player who posted the note; only the author may delete it.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 instant the note was posted (descriptive metadata only).

room_id.description: Id of the room whose board this note is pinned to.
